signatures.name: NULL_SCAN_ATTEMPT
signatures.description: Detection of a TCP packet with no flags set. Used for stealth scanning.

signatures.name: SYN_FIN_ANOMALY
signatures.description: Detection of SYN (2) and FIN (1) flags set simultaneously. This is a TCP violation.

signatures.name: XMAS_SCAN_DETECTION
signatures.description: Detection of FIN (1), PSH (8), and URG (32) flags. 'Lights up' the packet like a Christmas tree.

signatures.name: MALICIOUS_PUSH_PAYLOAD
signatures.description: Detection of the PSH flag, often used in manual data injection attempts.
